hooks.prompt: If wiki/hot.md exists, silently read it to restore recent context. Do not announce.
Hook-injected context does not survive compaction. Re-read wiki/hot.md if it exists.

hooks.command: [ -d .git ] && git add wiki/ raw/ 2>/dev/null && (git diff --cached --quiet || git commit -m "wiki: auto-commit $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')" 2>/dev/null) || true

git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -q '^wiki/' && echo 'WIKI_CHANGED: Please refresh wiki/hot.md with current session context (Key Facts, Recent Changes, Active Threads). Keep under 500 words.' || true
